mapper.select: SELECT r.id, r.name, COUNT(DISTINCT ur.user_id) AS user_count, COUNT(DISTINCT rm.menu_id) AS menu_count, r.created_at FROM sys_role r LEFT JOIN sys_user_role ur ON ur.role_id = r.id LEFT JOIN sys_role_menu rm ON rm.role_id = r.id GROUP BY r.id, r.name, r.created_at ORDER BY CASE r.name WHEN 'ADMIN' THEN 1 WHEN 'ANALYST' THEN 2 WHEN 'VIEWER' THEN 3 ELSE 99 END, r.id ASC
SELECT r.id, r.name, 0 AS user_count, 0 AS menu_count, r.created_at FROM sys_role r WHERE r.id = #{id}
SELECT r.id, r.name, 0 AS user_count, 0 AS menu_count, r.created_at FROM sys_role r WHERE r.name = #{name} LIMIT 1
